series_metadata.series_description: Records created in the license division database (electronic computer system, ODIIS) for purpose of documenting, processing and storing license/registration information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 15 years after agent is no longer licensed/registered. Then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 15 years after agent is no longer licensed/registered. Then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
